title: Repair vehicle aluminium body panels without the use of body filler
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair vehicle aluminium body panels without the use of body filler demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair aluminium body panels

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check aluminium repair materials, tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify aluminium repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check aluminium repair materials, tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify aluminium repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check aluminium repair materials, tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify aluminium repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair aluminium body panels

elements.title: Carry out repair and heat shrinking activities

pcs.text: Identify, remove, strip and prepare aluminium panel to be repaired for repair according to workplace procedures2.2 Select tools and equipment to prevent cross-contamination2.3 Source and test aluminium welding equipment for operation2.4 Use oxyacetylene plant to anneal and heat shrink stretched panel section as required2.5 Finish aluminium panel repair to pre-paint condition without the use of body filler using planishing and file finishing techniques, and according to OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods, workplace instructions, and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, remove, strip and prepare aluminium panel to be repaired for repair according to workplace procedures2.2 Select tools and equipment to prevent cross-contamination2.3 Source and test aluminium welding equipment for operation2.4 Use oxyacetylene plant to anneal and heat shrink stretched panel section as required2.5 Finish aluminium panel repair to pre-paint condition without the use of body filler using planishing and file finishing techniques, and according to OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods, workplace instructions, and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, remove, strip and prepare aluminium panel to be repaired for repair according to workplace procedures2.2 Select tools and equipment to prevent cross-contamination2.3 Source and test aluminium welding equipment for operation2.4 Use oxyacetylene plant to anneal and heat shrink stretched panel section as required2.5 Finish aluminium panel repair to pre-paint condition without the use of body filler using planishing and file finishing techniques, and according to OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods, workplace instructions, and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out repair and heat shrinking activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
